L

label - Variable in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
The field for the label record component.
label - Variable in record class client.view.UserLoginController.Quick
The field for the label record component.
label - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController.TickTarget
The countdown label to update each tick.
label() - Method in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Returns the value of the label record component.
label() - Method in record class client.view.UserLoginController.Quick
Returns the value of the label record component.
labelFor(ParamField) - Static method in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Friendly label for a parameter field, e.g.
labelFor(ParamField) - Static method in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Friendly label for a parameter field, e.g.
leave(int) - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Leaves the waiting list (or declines an offer) after a confirmation prompt.
LEAVE_WAITLIST - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Leave the waiting list (or decline an active grab offer).
leaveWaitlist(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Leaves the waiting list for a WAITING reservation.
LIST_NOTIFICATIONS - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
List the logged-in actor's notifications, newest first.
LIST_PARKS - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
List every park (e.g.
LIST_PENDING_CHANGES - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
List all pending parameter-change requests (dept.
LIST_RESERVATIONS - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
List all reservations owned by a visitor.
LIST_WAITLIST - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
List a visitor's active waiting-list entries.
listAll() - Method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Lists every park, alphabetically by name — used to populate the booking park dropdown.
listener - Variable in class server.net.OrderServer
Receives lifecycle, connection, and activity events.
listeners - Variable in class client.service.NetworkService
Registered connection-state listeners, notified after each call.
listForUser(int) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Lists every notification addressed to a staff user, newest first.
listForVisitor(long) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Lists every notification addressed to a visitor, newest first.
listNotifications() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists the logged-in actor's notifications, newest first (the offline-fetch path for the notification center).
listParks() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists every park, for the booking dropdown.
listPending() - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Lists every request still awaiting a decision, oldest first.
listPendingChanges() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists all PENDING parameter-change requests (DEPT_MANAGER only).
listReservations(long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists every reservation owned by a visitor.
listWaitlist(long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries (queue position + any live grab offer).
load() - Method in class client.view.ApprovalQueueController
Loads the pending queue from the server and repaints the table.
load() - Method in class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Loads the actor's notifications from the server and repaints the list.
load() - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Loads the visitor's WAITING entries and repaints.
load() - Static method in class server.db.DotEnv
Locates and parses the .env file (see the class description for the search order), copying every pair into the in-memory map and into system properties that are not already set.
loadBtn - Variable in class client.view.ReservationListController
Loads the reservations for the entered visitor id.
loaded - Static variable in class server.db.DotEnv
Whether DotEnv.load() has already run (it is idempotent).
loadFor(long) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Fetches and renders the reservations for a visitor, then subscribes to them.
loadingCard(String) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Placeholder card shown while a metric is still loading.
loadInto(BiConsumer<String, String>) - Static method in class server.db.DotEnv
Feeds every loaded key/value pair to the given consumer, letting callers forward the .env contents elsewhere (for example into another configuration object).
loadPark() - Method in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Fetches the manager's own park and fills the current-values panel.
loadParks() - Method in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS, with an "All parks" option (id null) at the top for a region-wide report.
loadParks() - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS.
loadParks() - Method in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS, with an "All parks" option (id null) at the top for a region-wide report.
loadParks() - Method in class client.view.WaitlistController
Loads park id → name once, then loads the waiting list.
loadVisitorReservations(Map<Integer, String>) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Loads the visitor's reservations and fills the next-visit/active cards.
locateEnvFile() - Static method in class server.db.DotEnv
Returns the first .env file found in the search order, or null.
lock(long, String) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Acquires the single-login lock for an actor by inserting a row into active_session.
log - Variable in class server.scheduler.ConfirmTimeoutJob
One-line summary sink, wired to the server console activity log.
log - Variable in class server.scheduler.NoShowJob
One-line summary sink, wired to the server console activity log.
log - Variable in class server.scheduler.ReminderJob
One-line summary sink, wired to the server console activity log.
log - Variable in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
One-line summary sink, forwarded to each job and used for lifecycle logging.
log - Variable in class server.scheduler.WaitlistGrabExpiryJob
One-line summary sink, wired to the server console activity log.
logBox - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Container holding the activity-log entries.
loggedInActorId - Variable in class server.net.ClientSession
Id of the actor authenticated on this connection, or null if none.
loggedInKind - Variable in class server.net.ClientSession
Single-login lock kind held ("USER"/"VISITOR"), or null.
login(ClientConnection, String, int) - Method in class client.app.Session
Promotes a freshly probed connection into the session (connection screen).
LOGIN_STAFF - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Authenticate a staff user by username and password.
LOGIN_VISITOR - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Authenticate a visitor by national id.
loginStaff(String, String) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Authenticates a staff user.
loginVisitor(long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Authenticates a visitor by national ID.
logout() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Logs the current actor out, releasing the server-side single-login lock.
LOGOUT - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Log the current actor out and release the single-login lock.
logoutBtn - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Logout button.
